'''''Star Wars: I Am a Jedi Apprentice''''' is a children's book released in [[2002]] by [[Random House]]. Written by [[Marc Cerasini]], the book is told from [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's]] point of view in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

==Plot summary==
{{Plot}}

==Continuity==
The book references the events of ''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]''.

==Media==
===Editions===
*{{ISBN|0375814930}}; [[April 23]], [[2002]], [[Random House]], 24-page paperback
*{{ISBN|0439980976}}; 2002, [[Scholastic]], 24-page paperback
